productDisplayName: Baggit Women Square Taj Black Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 19 cm x 9 cmCrafted from genuine leatherette with a three-fold open styleBuckle detail on the upper and a press button closurePrinted branding on the backPress button closure inside the wallet to secure the first two foldsSix card holders, one id card holder, two pockets and a key holder on the left foldFour card holders, a zippered compartment and a pocket on the centre foldA pocket on the backCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
